info.title: OpenCrane Control Plane API
info.description:
Multi-tenant AI agent platform management API.

**Authentication**

- *Human operators* — OIDC browser flow via `GET /auth/login` → `/auth/callback`. Session cookie is set server-side.
- *CLI operators* — Device authorization grant via `POST /auth/device`. The CLI opens the returned `verificationUri` in the operator's browser, polls `GET /auth/device/token`, and persists the issued token in `~/.config/opencrane/credentials.json`.
- *Automation / CI* — Bearer token via the `OPENCRANE_TOKEN` environment variable, validated against the `OPENCRANE_API_TOKEN` server-side env var.
- Endpoints tagged *Auth* and *Meta* (`/auth/*`, `/openapi.json`) require no credentials.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Absent when hasMore is false.

clusterTenantRef.description: Parent ClusterTenant (customer) this tenant attaches to; absent on the single-instance path.

brokeringMode.description: Brokering strategy: 'static' (per-tenant/per-server secret fallback) or 'obo' (per-user RFC 8693 exchange brokered server-side; no static secret).

secretRef.description: Secret reference for 'static' brokering; null for 'obo'.

McpCatalogServer.description: A catalogue server as exposed by the operator API (distinct from the registry McpServer). Every field beyond id is optional so the same shape serves the entitled user catalogue and the admin governance view.

type.description: Consumption shape; decides the credential-connect flow.

entitlementSummary.description: Human-readable summary of who is entitled (admin view).

key.description: Stable key the value is submitted under.

required.description: Whether the field must be supplied.

sensitive.description: Whether the value is secret (masked, never echoed back).

McpInstalled.description: A server installed by the calling user. Never carries credential material — only the connection status and a non-secret account label.

lastUsed.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last use, or null when never used.

connectedAccount.description: Non-secret display label of the connected account.

everyoneInOrg.description: When true, every caller in the org is entitled (lists ignored).

initials.description: Two-letter initials derived from the name.

color.description: Deterministic avatar colour derived from the identifier.

McpDirectory.description: The selectable universe of users and groups for the admin access editor.

vanityDomain.description: Optional customer-vanity domain CNAMEd onto the org's derived apex (<name>.<platformBaseDomain>); an overlay, not the org identity. When unset, only the derived apex serves the org.

isolationTier.description: Isolation strength chosen for this customer.

nodePool.description: Dedicated node pool name; required when mode is 'dedicated'.

vanityDomain.description: Optional customer-vanity domain CNAMEd onto the org's derived apex (<name>.<platformBaseDomain>); an overlay, not the org identity.

ClusterTenantUpdate.description: Partial cluster-tenant update; the immutable name comes from the path. Every field is optional — only those present are changed.

displayName.description: New human-readable customer name (must be non-blank when present).

vanityDomain.description: New customer-vanity domain CNAMEd onto the org apex; an empty string clears it (back to the derived <name>.<base> apex only).

isolationTier.description: New isolation strength; re-gated against the provisioner registry when changed.

nodePool.description: Dedicated node pool name; required when mode is 'dedicated'.

cpu.description: Total CPU the customer may request (e.g. '4', '500m').

memory.description: Total memory the customer may request (e.g. '8Gi').

pods.description: Maximum number of pods the customer may run.

storage.description: Total persistent storage the customer may claim (e.g. '100Gi').

gpu.description: Total GPUs the customer may request.

subject.description: IdP-verified subject (OIDC sub) that owns this billing account.

email.description: The caller's verified email at create time (for human reconciliation; not the key).

BillingAccountWrite.description: Create payload for the caller's own billing account. The subject and email come from the session (never the body); only an optional displayName is accepted.

Share.description: An inter-user share: an Allow grant the caller created on a recipient for an entitlement they hold (S4).

payloadId.description: Id of the shared MCP server or skill bundle.

recipientType.description: Whether the share targets a user (IdP subject) or a group.

recipientId.description: The recipient user subject or group id.

sharedBy.description: IdP subject of the user who created the share.

scope.description: Whether the credential is platform-wide or owned by one ClusterTenant.

clusterTenant.description: Owning ClusterTenant when scope is clusterTenant; null for Global.

provider.description: Free-text provider key (e.g. openai, anthropic, bedrock).

secretRef.description: Name of the External-Secrets-synced k8s Secret carrying the provider key (never the raw key).

litellmCredentialName.description: LiteLLM /credentials name when registered for the dynamic path; null for the env baseline.

secretRef.description: Name of the External-Secrets-synced k8s Secret carrying the provider key. A raw key field (apiKey/keyValue/key) is rejected with 400.

litellmCredentialName.description: Optional LiteLLM /credentials name for the dynamic no-restart path.

scope.description: Whether the model is platform-wide or owned by one ClusterTenant.

clusterTenant.description: Owning ClusterTenant when scope is clusterTenant; null for Global.

publicModelName.description: The routable public slug callers request, e.g. openai/gpt-4o.

litellmModelId.description: Deployment id returned by LiteLLM /model/new (or a deterministic placeholder when LiteLLM is unconfigured).

apiBase.description: Optional non-default API base for self-hosted / proxied endpoints.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default model at its scope.

providerCredentialId.description: The provider credential backing this model, when set.

publicModelName.description: The routable public slug, e.g. openai/gpt-4o.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default model at its scope.

AutoRoutingConfig.description: Opt-in auto-routing configuration. Auto routing applies ONLY when a skill (or scope default) selects it; the runtime optimizer that consumes it is a later track item (AIR.7).

costQualitySlider.description: Cost↔quality dial for the balanced objective: 0 = cheapest … 10 = best.

qualityFloor.description: Minimum eval score a model must clear; defaults to the skill's own bar when omitted.

maxBudgetUsd.description: Hard per-decision spend ceiling in USD.

allowedModels.description: Restrict auto to this subset of publicModelNames; must stay within the key's allowlist.

latencyCeilingMs.description: Reject/penalize models slower than this many milliseconds.

sessionPin.description: Keep the chosen model stable within a conversation to preserve prompt caches.

explorationRate.description: Fraction of traffic to explore alternatives on (0 = pure exploit).

scope.description: Whether this default is platform-wide or per-ClusterTenant.

clusterTenant.description: Owning ClusterTenant when scope is clusterTenant; null for Global.

defaultModel.description: Default model publicModelName at this scope; null when unset.

autoConfig.description: Default auto-routing config at this scope; null when unset.

costQualitySlider.description: Cost↔quality dial for the balanced objective: 0 = cheapest … 10 = best.

qualityFloor.description: Minimum eval score a model must clear; defaults to the skill's own bar when omitted.

maxBudgetUsd.description: Hard per-decision spend ceiling in USD.

allowedModels.description: Restrict auto to this subset of publicModelNames; must stay within the key's allowlist.

latencyCeilingMs.description: Reject/penalize models slower than this many milliseconds.

sessionPin.description: Keep the chosen model stable within a conversation to preserve prompt caches.

explorationRate.description: Fraction of traffic to explore alternatives on (0 = pure exploit).

ModelRoutingDefaultWrite.description: Upsert body for a scope-level model-routing default. At least one of defaultModel or autoConfig is required.

costQualitySlider.description: Cost↔quality dial for the balanced objective: 0 = cheapest … 10 = best.

qualityFloor.description: Minimum eval score a model must clear; defaults to the skill's own bar when omitted.

maxBudgetUsd.description: Hard per-decision spend ceiling in USD.

allowedModels.description: Restrict auto to this subset of publicModelNames; must stay within the key's allowlist.

latencyCeilingMs.description: Reject/penalize models slower than this many milliseconds.

sessionPin.description: Keep the chosen model stable within a conversation to preserve prompt caches.

explorationRate.description: Fraction of traffic to explore alternatives on (0 = pure exploit).

name.description: Skill name (part of the compound key).

scope.description: Skill scope, e.g. org/team/personal (part of the compound key).

team.description: Owning team for team-scoped skills; empty string when not team-scoped (part of the compound key).

path.description: Workspace-relative path the skill is delivered to.

modelMode.description: pinned (use pinnedModel), auto (route within autoConfig), or null (inherit the scope default).

pinnedModel.description: The pinned model's publicModelName, when modelMode is pinned.

autoConfig.description: The skill's auto-routing config, when modelMode is auto.

costQualitySlider.description: Cost↔quality dial for the balanced objective: 0 = cheapest … 10 = best.

qualityFloor.description: Minimum eval score a model must clear; defaults to the skill's own bar when omitted.

maxBudgetUsd.description: Hard per-decision spend ceiling in USD.

allowedModels.description: Restrict auto to this subset of publicModelNames; must stay within the key's allowlist.

latencyCeilingMs.description: Reject/penalize models slower than this many milliseconds.

sessionPin.description: Keep the chosen model stable within a conversation to preserve prompt caches.

explorationRate.description: Fraction of traffic to explore alternatives on (0 = pure exploit).

SkillModelPostureWrite.description: Set a skill's model posture. pinned requires pinnedModel; auto validates autoConfig; null clears the posture (inherit the scope default).

modelMode.description: pinned, auto, or null to clear the posture.

costQualitySlider.description: Cost↔quality dial for the balanced objective: 0 = cheapest … 10 = best.

qualityFloor.description: Minimum eval score a model must clear; defaults to the skill's own bar when omitted.

maxBudgetUsd.description: Hard per-decision spend ceiling in USD.

allowedModels.description: Restrict auto to this subset of publicModelNames; must stay within the key's allowlist.

latencyCeilingMs.description: Reject/penalize models slower than this many milliseconds.

sessionPin.description: Keep the chosen model stable within a conversation to preserve prompt caches.

explorationRate.description: Fraction of traffic to explore alternatives on (0 = pure exploit).

expected.description: Optional golden answer or grader rubric.

qualityBar.description: Minimum judge score (0..1) a model must clear on this case.

RoutingEvalCaseWrite.description: Create/update body for a routing eval case (AIR.6).

expected.description: Optional golden answer or grader rubric.

candidateModel.description: The cheaper candidate model evaluated against the current default.

sampledCalls.description: Number of logged calls sampled + shadow-graded.

atBarCheapFraction.description: Fraction of sampled traffic the candidate served at-or-above the skill's bar.

projectedSavingsPct.description: Point estimate of % spend saved at equal quality.

ciLowPct.description: Lower bound of the bootstrap 95% CI on projected savings.

ciHighPct.description: Upper bound of the bootstrap 95% CI on projected savings.

overheadPct.description: Token overhead of running the measurement, as % of the skill's serve spend.

skillContentHash.description: Skill content version coordinate: the Skill.contentHash at run time (best-effort; null if unresolved).

skillDigest.description: Skill content version coordinate: the live published SkillBundle.digest at run time (best-effort; null when no published bundle).

candidateModelId.description: Model deployment coordinate: the candidate's stable litellmModelId (best-effort; null if unresolved).

candidateUpstreamModel.description: Model deployment coordinate: the candidate's upstreamModel (best-effort; null if unresolved).

fromModel.description: The model the skill resolves to today (null when unset).

proposedModel.description: The cheaper model the loop proposes switching to.

projectedSavingsPct.description: Point estimate of % spend saved at equal quality.

ciLowPct.description: Lower bound of the bootstrap 95% CI (must exclude zero to propose).

ciHighPct.description: Upper bound of the bootstrap 95% CI.

skillContentHash.description: Skill content version coordinate: the Skill.contentHash at proposal time (best-effort; null if unresolved).

skillDigest.description: Skill content version coordinate: the live published SkillBundle.digest at proposal time (best-effort; null when none).

proposedModelId.description: Model deployment coordinate: the proposed model's stable litellmModelId (best-effort; null if unresolved).

measurementId.description: The measurement that produced this proposal.

modelMode.description: The skill's posture: pinned, auto, or null (inherits the scope default) — lets the UI flag a fixed-model advisory distinctly.

currentModel.description: The model the skill resolves to today — proposal fromModel, else the skill's pin, else null.

recommendedModel.description: The cheaper model recommended — proposal proposedModel, else the measurement candidate, else null.

recommendedModelId.description: Stable deployment id of the recommended model — proposal proposedModelId, else the measurement's candidateModelId, else null.

skillContentHash.description: Skill content version coordinate the evidence was gathered at — lets the console flag stale evidence; null if unresolved.

skillDigest.description: Live published SkillBundle.digest the evidence was gathered at; null when none.

projectedSavingsPct.description: Point estimate of % spend saved at equal quality (from the latest measurement).

ciLowPct.description: Lower bound of the bootstrap 95% CI on projected savings.

ciHighPct.description: Upper bound of the bootstrap 95% CI on projected savings.

hasOpenProposal.description: True when an open Pending proposal exists for this skill.

proposalId.description: Id of the open Pending proposal, when one exists; null otherwise.

measurementId.description: Id of the latest measurement this recommendation is derived from.

deviceCode.description: Secret code used by the CLI to poll for the token.

verificationUri.description: Relative URL the operator should open in a browser.

bearerAuth.description: Static bearer token. Pass as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

get.summary: List all cluster tenants (fleet view — platform-operator only)
get.description: Fleet-wide list. Restricted to platform operators; a per-org owner/admin reads only their own org via GET /cluster-tenants/{name}.

403.description: Caller is not a platform operator.

post.summary: Create a cluster tenant (organisation) and become its owner
post.description: Any authenticated user WITH an existing billing account may create an organisation; the caller is recorded as the org's single owner transactionally. Requires a billing account first (POST /billing-accounts), NOT pre-existing org-admin — a user becomes an org admin by creating their first org. Rejects an isolation tier no provisioner can serve.

201.description: Cluster tenant created; caller recorded as owner.

403.description: Caller has no billing account (code BILLING_ACCOUNT_REQUIRED).

409.description: A workspace with this name already exists (code CONFLICT).

422.description: Requested isolation tier is not served by any registered provisioner (code TIER_UNAVAILABLE).

get.summary: Get a single cluster tenant by name (operator OR owner/admin of that org)

403.description: Caller is neither a platform operator nor an owner/admin of this org.

put.summary: Update a cluster tenant (operator OR owner/admin of that org); re-gates the isolation tier when it changes

403.description: Caller is neither a platform operator nor an owner/admin of this org.

422.description: Requested isolation tier is not served by any registered provisioner (code TIER_UNAVAILABLE).

delete.summary: Delete a cluster tenant (operator OR owner/admin of that org)

403.description: Caller is neither a platform operator nor an owner/admin of this org.

get.summary: Get the observed status of a cluster tenant (operator OR owner/admin of that org)

403.description: Caller is neither a platform operator nor an owner/admin of this org.

post.summary: Refresh a cluster tenant's status and reconcile its owner workspace tenant
post.description: Re-reads the operator's observed phase from the CR (mirroring it to the DB), then — when the org is fully `ready` but has no workspace Tenant projected — seeds the owner's `<org>-default` Tenant via the same dual-write (CRD + DB row) the create path uses. Idempotent: a ready org that already has its tenant just returns the current status.

200.description: Refreshed status, plus the default-tenant reconcile outcome (null when the org is not yet ready).

403.description: Caller is neither a platform operator nor an owner/admin of this org.

post.summary: Create the caller's own billing account (idempotent per subject)
post.description: Any authenticated user creates their OWN billing account, keyed to their IdP-verified subject (never request input). Idempotent: a repeat call returns the existing account (200) instead of failing. Having a billing account is the gate for creating an organisation (POST /cluster-tenants).

get.summary: Return the caller's own billing account

404.description: Caller has no billing account (code BILLING_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND).

get.summary: Proxy a metrics query to the self-hosted Langfuse backend (server-side auth; non-operators scoped to their tenant)

parameters.description: Langfuse v1 metrics `query` JSON, forwarded verbatim (a tenant filter is injected for non-operators).

502.description: Upstream dependency (Kubernetes, database, Cognee, LiteLLM) returned an error.

get.summary: Query audit log entries with optional tenant filter and cursor pagination

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Filter to a specific tenant.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum entries to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response for keyset pagination.

get.summary: List token usage records
Get latest server utilisation snapshot (CPU, memory, storage, active tenants)
Get projection drift metrics with threshold evaluation and alert state
Return current auth mode and authenticated user identity (if any)
get.description: No authentication required. Returns 200 with the current session or an anonymous identity when no session is established.

mode.description: Active authentication mode for this instance.

issuer.description: Identity provider that authenticated the user.

groups.description: The caller's group memberships from the OIDC groups claim (empty when none).

isPlatformOperator.description: True iff the caller's groups intersect OPENCRANE_PLATFORM_OPERATOR_GROUPS. Empty/unset config ⇒ false (fail-closed). Introspection only — the API stays the enforcement point and the frontend uses this only to hide UI. Superseded once a first-class role model lands.

isOrgAdmin.description: True iff the caller is an organisation admin (groups intersect OPENCRANE_ORG_ADMIN_GROUPS, or the caller is a platform operator). Gates MCP-catalogue curation/approval (requireOrgAdmin). Empty/unset config ⇒ false (fail-closed). Introspection only — the API stays the enforcement point.

clusterTenant.description: The caller's ClusterTenant (customer) key, resolved server-side from their IdP-verified email → tenant → clusterTenantRef. Null when unresolved or ambiguous.

ownedOrgs.description: Organisations the caller owns or administers, derived fresh from their OrgMembership rows (owner/admin only; members excluded). Empty when the caller administers no org. The org-scope half of the membership-derived isOrgAdmin. Introspection only — never taken from request input.

role.description: The administering role the caller holds in this org.

post.summary: Resolve the caller's OpenClaw pod gateway connection coordinates from their OIDC session
post.description: Single sign-on across the control plane and the tenant pod: requires an established OIDC session (cookie) and returns the `wss://` gateway URL for the caller's own pod. Under trusted-proxy gateway auth the browser holds no credential — the gateway socket is authorised at the ingress against the live session (`/auth/gateway-verify`), so no token is returned. The tenant is resolved solely from the session's verified email, so a caller cannot obtain another user's pod connection. Returns 401 without a session, 403 when no tenant matches the session email, 409 when the pod has no gateway URL / ingress host yet or when the email maps to more than one tenant.

200.description: The caller's OpenClaw pod gateway connection coordinates.

gatewayUrl.description: The `wss://` OpenClaw gateway URL to open.

ingressHost.description: Host the tenant's OpenClaw pod is reachable at, when known.

403.description: Session has no email claim, or no tenant is provisioned for it.

409.description: The tenant pod has no gateway URL / ingress host yet.

get.summary: Redirect the browser to the configured OIDC identity provider to start login
get.description: Browser redirect — not intended for programmatic use. Returns 503 when OIDC is not configured.

parameters.name: returnTo
parameters.description: Path to redirect back to after a successful login.

get.summary: OIDC authorization callback — validates the response and establishes a session
get.description: Called by the identity provider after a successful login. Redirects back to the SPA.

post.summary: Destroy the current session and return the IdP RP-initiated logout URL
post.description: Invalidates the server-side session. When OIDC is enabled and the identity provider advertises an `end_session_endpoint`, returns the URL the browser should navigate to so the upstream IdP session is also terminated (OIDC RP-Initiated Logout). The local session is always destroyed; `endSessionUrl` is null when no upstream logout is possible (OIDC disabled, IdP exposes no end-session endpoint, or the session captured no id_token). Non-browser callers may ignore the URL.

200.description: Session destroyed; optional IdP logout URL returned.

endSessionUrl.description: Absolute URL the browser should navigate to in order to terminate the upstream IdP session. Null when no upstream logout is configured or possible.

post.summary: Initiate a CLI device authorization grant
post.description: Returns a device code and short user code. The CLI prints the verificationUri for the operator to open in a browser. No credentials required.

get.summary: Activate a device grant in the browser (requires OIDC session)
get.description: The operator opens this URL after a CLI login prompt. If no OIDC session is present the user is redirected to the identity provider first. On success an access token is created and the CLI poll endpoint unblocks.

parameters.name: userCode
parameters.description: Short user code from the CLI prompt (e.g. ABCD-1234).

200.description: Grant activated. HTML confirmation page returned.

302.description: Redirect to OIDC login (no active session).

404.description: User code not found or expired.

get.summary: Poll for the access token after browser activation
get.description: Returns 202 while pending, 200 with token when authorized, 410 when the grant has expired. The token is delivered exactly once.

parameters.name: deviceCode
parameters.description: Secret device code returned by POST /auth/device.

410.description: Grant expired. Run `oc auth login` again.

get.summary: Retrieve the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API
